title: Lineara harness result row (v0)
description: One row appended to results/experiments.jsonl per scoring run. The file is append-only: rows are never edited or deleted.

run_id.description: UUID4 generated per scoring run. Unique across the entire result history.

hypothesis_path.description: Repo-relative path to the hypothesis YAML at the time of the run.

hypothesis_hash.description: sha256 over the canonicalized hypothesis (sha256:<hex>). Lets readers detect rows whose hypothesis source has been edited since the run.

harness_version.description: Schema/coder generation tag. Bump when the metric or stream construction changes in a way that breaks bit-comparability.

metric.description: Name of the metric used to score this row.

score.description: Primary metric output. For compression_delta_v0: baseline_bits - mapped_bits (positive = compression improvement). For partial_mapping_compression_delta_v0: same delta computed by treating the candidate equation's sign_to_phoneme dict as a partial global mapping. For local_fit_v0: position_term + bigram_term. For local_fit_v1: A*pos + B*bigram - C*length_penalty - D*rare_sign. For geographic_genre_fit_v1: alpha*region_compat + (1-alpha)*semantic_compat ∈ [0,1]. See harness/metrics.py.

score_control_z.description: Standardized score against a control distribution of N>=100 random phoneme-permutations of the same alignment, seeded for reproducibility. Present iff metric == 'local_fit_v0'.

metric_notes.description: Free-form notes from the metric (e.g. control parameters, sub-term breakdown). Present iff the metric emits them.

position_term.description: Mean log(BC + floor) over (sign, phoneme) pairs. Present iff metric == 'local_fit_v1'.

bigram_term.description: Mean log P(p_i | p_{i-1}) over the equation's bigrams under the empirical pool LM. Present iff metric == 'local_fit_v1'. Null when the hypothesis's source_pool has no matching pool YAML (anchors, scrambles, manually-curated cross-pool fragments) — the bigram term is excluded from the metric sum and the position term is rescaled in compensation; see harness/metrics.py local_fit_v1.

rare_sign_correction.description: Fraction of the equation's signs that occur fewer than the rare-sign threshold times in the corpus stream. Present iff metric == 'local_fit_v1'.

region_compat.description: Region × site categorical compat in [0,1]. Present iff metric == 'geographic_genre_fit_v1'.

semantic_compat.description: Semantic-field × genre_hint categorical compat in [0,1]. Present iff metric == 'geographic_genre_fit_v1'.

bits_per_sign_baseline.description: Baseline encoding bits divided by the number of tokens in the stream. Present iff metric is compression_delta_v0 or partial_mapping_compression_delta_v0.

bits_per_sign_mapped.description: Mapped encoding bits divided by the number of tokens in the stream. Present iff metric is compression_delta_v0 or partial_mapping_compression_delta_v0.

corpus_records_used.description: Number of corpus records that contributed at least one token to the stream (i.e. n_signs > 0 records after filtering).

corpus_snapshot.description: Identifier of the corpus snapshot used for the run. Format 'git:<sha>' for committed corpora; 'sha256:<hex>' for content-hashed snapshots.

ran_at.description: UTC RFC-3339 timestamp at the start of the run.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the scoring run in milliseconds.

notes.description: Operator note attached at submission time (e.g. via --note). Empty string when none provided.
